title: Khawr Fakkān Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Khawr Fakkān with a Z-Score of +5.06. This event has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Khawr Fakkān is causing extremely high temperatures, with a Cooling Degree Days (CDD) value of 16.7 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 27%, which is relatively low, and the wind speed is 7.7 km/h. 
 The Heat Wave has a significant impact on various aspects of life in Khawr Fakkān, including health, agriculture, and energy consumption.
conclusion: Implement emergency measures to mitigate the effects of the heat wave immediately.
